issues.detail: Skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, only happy path examples.

scenarios.name: Create structured OneNote standup page with to-do tags via Graph API
scenarios.rationale: Baseline suggested wrong Graph endpoints or missed XHTML requirements; treatment POSTed to /users/{userId}/onenote/sections/{sectionId}/pages with Content-Type application/xhtml+xml, included <title>, <meta name=created>, and data-tag=to-do on action items as documented.

scenarios.name: Find OneNote page by title and append an update via PATCH
scenarios.rationale: Baseline tried to overwrite the page or used the wrong PATCH shape; treatment used $filter=contains(title, ...) to find the page, then PATCH /onenote/pages/{pageId}/content with [{target: body, action: append, position: after, content: ...}] exactly as documented.
